mapper.select: SELECT * FROM department d WHERE d.dept_id = #{deptId} AND D.DEPT_STATUS = 'PENDING_DELETE'

SELECT e.emp_id, e.emp_no, e.emp_name, e.emp_status, p.pos_name, p.pos_order FROM employee e JOIN emp_position p ON e.pos_id = p.pos_id WHERE e.dept_id = #{deptId} ORDER BY p.pos_order ASC, e.emp_name ASC

SELECT r.rev_id, r.status, r.req_date, e.emp_id, e.emp_name, res.res_id, res.res_name FROM reservation r JOIN employee e ON r.emp_id = e.emp_id JOIN com_resource res ON r.res_id = res.res_id WHERE e.dept_id = #{deptId} AND r.status = 'WAI' ORDER BY r.req_date ASC

SELECT l.lin_id, l.lin_order, l.lin_status, ad.doc_id, ad.doc_title, e.emp_id, e.emp_name FROM appr_line l JOIN employee e ON l.emp_id = e.emp_id JOIN appr_doc ad ON l.doc_id = ad.doc_id WHERE e.dept_id = #{deptId} AND l.lin_status IN ('NOT', 'WAI') ORDER BY ad.created_at ASC, l.lin_order ASC
SELECT d.doc_id, d.doc_title, d.doc_status, e.emp_id, e.emp_name FROM appr_doc d JOIN employee e ON d.emp_id = e.emp_id WHERE e.dept_id = #{deptId} AND d.doc_status = 'ING' ORDER BY d.created_at ASC
SELECT LISTAGG(doc_title, ' | ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY doc_title) FROM appr_doc WHERE doc_status = 'ING' AND emp_id IN (SELECT emp_id FROM employee WHERE dept_id = #{deptId})
